title: sambucus coreana
intro: Sambucus coreana, also known as the Korean elder, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sambucus coreana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and flu. Sambucus coreana can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including upper respiratory tract infections and sinusitis.
